hero.description: I design and engineer complete web applications — from responsive, interactive frontends to robust, scalable backends. I turn complex requirements into clean, maintainable code.

services.title: What I Do
services.s1Desc: Building complete web applications end-to-end: pixel-perfect React & Next.js UIs paired with powerful Node.js, Laravel, or Spring Boot backends.
services.s2Desc: Architecting secure, high-performance REST and GraphQL APIs — with proper authentication, validation, rate limiting, and thorough documentation.
services.s3Desc: Modeling scalable schemas, writing optimized queries, and managing migrations across PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis.
services.s4Desc: Containerizing apps with Docker, automating CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions or Jenkins, and deploying to cloud environments with zero downtime.

project1.title: E-Commerce Platform
project1.desc: A fully functional modern e-commerce platform with real-time inventory, Stripe payments, and seamless checkout built with Angular & Node.js.

project2.title: School Management System
project2.desc: A comprehensive dashboard for managing student grades, attendance, and administrative tasks, built with C#, .NET Blazor, and SQL Server.

project3.title: AI Content Generator
project3.desc: A SaaS application leveraging React and the OpenAI API to automate content creation with customizable tone and format options.

project4.title: CRM Dashboard (Laravel)
project4.desc: A robust customer relationship management system built with PHP Laravel, Vue.js, and MySQL — featuring analytics and pipeline tracking.

project5.title: Finance API (Spring Boot)
project5.desc: A secure, high-performance financial microservice built with Java Spring Boot and PostgreSQL, using JWT auth and Redis caching.

project6.title: Task Collab (Angular & Node)
project6.desc: A real-time collaborative project management tool using Angular, Node.js, Socket.io, and MongoDB with role-based access control.

footer.text: © 2026 Mohammed Bouchelaghem. Built with React & Vite.
